# OGENCI — Global ROI Architecture

> A premier global digital agency rooted in Africa. We build high-converting digital ecosystems, run ROI-driven ad campaigns, and deploy AI systems that scale businesses worldwide.

## About OGENCI

OGENCI is a global digital agency headquartered in Accra, Ghana. We specialize in building high-conversion digital ecosystems, running ROI-driven ad campaigns, and deploying AI systems that scale businesses. Our approach combines engineering precision with creative excellence, delivering measurable business outcomes for clients across logistics, education, non-profit, and service industries.

**Location:** Accra, Ghana (GMT+0)

## Services

### Web Design
Editorial-style, conversion-optimized websites built for enterprise and high-growth organizations. Includes seamless admissions funnels, booking flows, and content management.

### Paid Advertising
ROI-driven ad campaigns with precise attribution modeling. Data-backed audience targeting and creative optimization.

### AI & Automation
Custom AI systems for business operations including autonomous agents, intelligent search, and automated workflows.

### Retainers
Ongoing maintenance, security updates, performance optimization, and content management.

## Pricing

### Foundation — $2,500/mo
- 5-page responsive website
- SEO & performance optimized
- Secure hosting & SSL
- 1 revision cycle
- ~2 week delivery for first 5 pages

### Growth — $3,500/mo
- Up to 10 pages
- SEO & performance optimized
- Priority support & 24h response
- 2 revision cycles
- Premium typography & animations
- ~2 week delivery

### Scale — $5,000/mo
- Unlimited pages
- Custom animations & micro-interactions
- Dedicated project manager
- Integration-ready (CRM, payments, analytics)
- Unlimited revisions
- ~3 week delivery

### Enterprise — Custom
- AI-powered automations
- Multi-language support
- Custom API integrations
- Dedicated design & engineering team
- Global CDN & 99.9% uptime SLA
- Ongoing UX research & A/B testing

## Process

1. **Discovery & Strategy** — Market analysis, conversion gap mapping, competitor research
2. **Design & Engineering** — Wireframing, UI/UX design, front-end + back-end development
3. **Optimization & SEO** — Performance tuning, search engine optimization, accessibility audit
4. **Launch & Maintenance** — Deployment, monitoring, ongoing optimization

## Case Studies

### Jonmoore International
**Industry:** Heavy Logistics | **Location:** Tema, Ghana | **Year:** 2026 (Concept)

Jonmoore executes 600-ton cargo operations with 25+ years of ISO-certified authority. We architected a premium, editorial-style digital experience that translates their physical engineering precision into a digital interface, with a streamlined 'Request a Quote' flow emphasizing their pristine safety record (1.2M+ man-hours without incident).

**Projected Impact:** +185% lead lift, -42% bounce rate, 10x brand trust

---

### ISA Ghana (International School of Accra)
**Industry:** Education | **Location:** Accra, Ghana | **Year:** 2025

Full-scale enterprise redesign for a leading school providing Cambridge & IB curricula. Transformed the platform into an immersive, editorial-style experience with a seamless admissions funnel.

**Impact:** +125% admissions lift, 3.2x prospect engagement, -60% mobile bounce rate

---

### BJH Logistics
**Industry:** Logistics | **Location:** Ghana | **Year:** 2025

Full-scale digital platform for a premium logistics firm. Integrated tracking, custom portal, and optimized booking flows.

---

### Accra Grammar
**Industry:** Education | **Location:** Ghana | **Year:** 2025

Complete digital identity and enrollment platform for one of Ghana's leading schools. Modern, accessible, and high-converting.

---

### Rich Jane School
**Industry:** Education | **Location:** Ghana | **Year:** 2024

An immersive, community-focused website for a premier preschool and primary institution.

---

### Wesleyan CM
**Industry:** Non-Profit / Faith | **Location:** Global | **Year:** 2025

Engineered a high-fidelity digital ecosystem centered on 'Digital Fellowship' including a custom low-latency streaming engine, AI-powered sermon search index, and streamlined global giving portal.

**Impact:** +310% stream reach, +85% donation lift, 4.5x global engagement

## Insights

### African Tech Leap: Why Ghana's tech ecosystem is the next frontier for global ROI
Ghana's tech landscape is experiencing unprecedented growth. Analysis of market opportunities, infrastructure development, and investment trends positioning Ghana as a tech hub.

### Attribution Metrics 2026: Redefining digital attribution for the AI era
Modern attribution modeling approaches that move beyond last-click to understand true conversion drivers across complex customer journeys.

### Autonomous AI Agents: How autonomous AI agents are reshaping digital operations
Deep dive into how AI agents are transforming business operations, from customer service to complex workflow automation.

### Navigating the New Landscape of Technology Regulations
Analysis of emerging tech regulations affecting digital operations including data privacy, AI governance, and cross-border compliance.
